testcase.name: AWS CRUD API Tests › should display the order management interface

failure.message: api.test.js:17:3 should display the order management interface

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › api.test.js:17:3 › AWS CRUD API Tests › should display the order management interface
Error: expect(locator).toContainText(expected) failed
Locator: locator('#apiStatus') Expected string: "API Online" Received: <element(s) not found> Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toContainText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('#apiStatus')
12 | 13 | // Check if API is online > 14 | await expect(page.locator('#apiStatus')).toContainText('API Online'); | ^ 15 | }); 16 | 17 | test('should display the order management interface', async ({ page }) => { at D:\Project\aws-crud-api\tests\api.test.js:14:46
